items.name: loyalty-engine
items.description: A Java-based API designed as a transactional loyalty engine, enabling businesses to manage and automate reward programs. It processes customer transactions in real time, calculates points, applies rules, and integrates seamlessly with external systems to deliver personalized loyalty experiences.

items.name: LoyalMini
items.description: LoyalMini is a decentralized loyalty and rewards protocol built on the Celo blockchain, designed specifically for small and informal merchants in emerging markets. It enables any merchant using MiniPay to launch a branded reward token program in under two minutes
